wedding-band-nice-france-riviera-roaming.intro_html:
Meet Riviera Roaming Band – a brilliant, professional acoustic band based in Nice, perfect for weddings & events across France, Italy & Switzerland

🌟 What guests absolutely love about Riviera Roaming Band: an incredible, high-energy roaming band, amazing crowd interaction, guests of all ages dancing the night away, flexible and super professional, and a truly unforgettable atmosphere

This amazing band started as a duo and has since become a specialist in roaming performances – now offering a variety of fantastic options for weddings and special events. You can explore the full range of wedding bands in France right here.

The band can also play an amplified/electric set with acoustic drums and a full sound system (just add a small fee for this extra sparkle). We’re proud to be listed on FixTheMusic's 24 Best Wedding Bands in France 🏆. Recently, we performed at a corporate event for a famous luxury fashion brand at the stunning Château Volterra in Ramatuelle, France – what a vibrant celebration that was!

Catch all the joyful moments by following us on Facebook and Instagram 📸.

Because the demand for our unforgettable wedding and event performances across Europe is so incredibly high, we now offer two alternative bands (check out the videos below). Both are trained to the highest level by our lead singer and manager Pierre, so they deliver the exact same dynamic, interactive experience you’d expect from our main band. View all of our France-based roaming bands ➡️

We’re regularly booked for weddings and events at gorgeous venues like Villa Pellegrini in Italy, Hotel Vitznauerhof in Switzerland, and Villa Mandala in Saint-Tropez, France. Ready to make your celebration amazing? Contact Riviera Roaming Band 💬

Every musician in the band studied at the very best music universities in France. They’ve worked hard on each song, and their vocal harmonies will simply take your breath away! View all of our France-based roaming bands ➡️

Riviera Roaming Band can play more than 200 songs covering every era and almost every style – perfect for keeping the dance floor packed all night. Based on the beautiful Côte d'Azur, we can be booked for special events throughout France and Europe. And if Elton John himself said these guys are awesome, well… you can totally trust him!

So if you’re looking to hire the finest pop covers wedding band the South of France has to offer, get in touch with Riviera Roaming Band. Follow us on Facebook and Instagram 📸, and please check out our website for even more information.

Note: if you book one of our alternative line-ups, the set list will vary from the one listed here. Just ask us for more details – we’d love to help you create the perfect musical journey!

The Italian Jazz Trio is a group of wonderfully experienced musicians who are passionate about bringing top-quality, unforgettable musical entertainment to your celebration.

We're proudly listed on FixTheMusic's best jazz bands in Italy

Performing classic jazz standards and bossa nova tunes in instrumental versions, this trio creates the perfect, vibrant soundtrack for any occasion.

These jazz musicians are known for their elegance, class, foot-tapping swing, and the amazing magic they bring to every party.

Take a look at our 2026 SET LIST

The group is incredibly versatile — they can play everything from subtle, romantic background tunes to high-energy classic swing that gets everyone dancing and having a fantastic time!

They are frequently booked for weddings and events at stunning venues like Hotel Villa Cipressi in Lake Como, The Atlanta Hotel in Rome, and Hotel Villa Olmi in Florence, Italy.

Contact The Italian Jazz Trio 💬
italian-jazz-trio-wedding-band.description_html:
With over 350 weddings and corporate events under their belts, The Italian Jazz Trio is incredibly experienced and performs regularly across Italy and Europe — making every event truly unforgettable.

View our list of Italy's best jazz bands ➡️

The Italian Jazz Trio is a classic old-fashioned jazz band with a repertoire of timeless songs made famous by Ella Fitzgerald, Frank Sinatra, Louis Armstrong, Billie Holiday, and Ray Charles, to name just a few amazing artists.

Their song list ranges from the 1930s to the great American Songbook classics of the 40s and 50s. This group is made up of talented musicians who have performed in some of Europe’s top venues, and they’ll play the perfect, vibrant music for your wedding reception.

For an even more melodious sound, the trio can also add an outstanding female singer. They can also perform as a jazz quartet with a saxophone — giving you even more flexibility for your perfect day.

View the complete range of wedding bands in Italy

For a more upbeat, dancing performance during the after-dinner set, we’re also available as a four-piece band with a fantastic female singer, offering everything from Jazz, Swing, and Soul/Motown to Disco, Pop, and Dance — a truly vibrant mix!

Meet The Florence String Quartet – ready to bring incredible music to your wedding or event in Tuscany and across Italy!

✨ What clients absolutely loved about The Florence String Quartet: Beautiful ceremony music, an elegant and vibrant atmosphere, talented and professional musicians, flexible with requests, amazing communication, a wide repertoire, punctual and easy to work with, guests were truly impressed.

The Florence String Quartet is a professional ensemble based in Florence, and they’re in high demand to perform at weddings and parties throughout Tuscany, Italy, and even across Europe. Their sound is perfect for creating an unforgettable and joyful celebration.

Check out the full range of string quartets in Italy on FixTheMusic.

With vast experience and a wide repertoire that includes classical and pop music, plus pieces from opera and famous movies, they can make any moment feel magical.

Clients who booked The Florence String Quartet also loved these amazing musicians on FixTheMusic:

  1. The Italy String Quartet

  2. Italian String Quartet

  3. Sparkle Strings

  4. Laura Violin

  5. The Florence Jazz Band

  6. The Wedding Tenor

  7. Mythos Strings

This group is one of FixTheMusic’s most popular classical ensembles, with an incredibly busy schedule throughout 2026 and 2027 – so book early for your perfect date!

Explore the complete range of options for wedding music in Italy

We’re regularly booked to perform at unforgettable weddings and events at stunning venues like Abbazia di San Galgano in Siena, Belmond Villa San Michele in Fiesole, and Villa Miani in Rome.

Get in touch with The Florence String Quartet 💬

The group also offers a string duo and string trio for weddings and functions across Italy, as well as solo violin or solo cello – perfect for intimate wedding ceremonies and other cozy celebrations. Need something extra? They can add an oboe, flute, or even a singer (tenor, soprano, etc.) to make the sound even more vibrant.

View our list of Italy’s best string quartets for hire ➡️

And if you want a little variety, the group can also provide an Italian folk trio or quartet, plus a DJ for your evening party or an acoustic singer-guitarist. Fun and flexibility – that’s what makes it amazing.

The quartet is led and managed by Lorenzo, who plays the violin and brings incredible energy to every performance.

The musicians are available to bring joyful music to weddings and corporate events all over Italy, including Siena, Arezzo, Pisa, Grosseto, Perugia, and Livorno.

If you’d like a quote for your wedding or event, just reach out via FixTheMusic for a free, no-pressure quote.

So if you’re looking to hire the finest string quartet Florence has to offer for your wedding or event, let’s make it unforgettable together!

wedding-band-rome-italy-sonics.description_html:
This vibrant party band covers everything from beautiful acoustic songs to high-energy party rock anthems, pop, soul, and of course all your absolute favorite party songs!

With top name artists like Rihanna, Ed Sheeran, Elvis, Lady Gaga, ABBA, and Nirvana in their repertoire, they also make sure to have the freshest, most up-to-date music ready to play for your special, unforgettable event.

The band is fronted by a fantastic female vocalist, and they can perform alongside additional musicians or even provide a live DJ to make the sound quality absolutely perfect and get the crowd up dancing all night long!

Available with a variety of lineup options, from an intimate duo right up to a full band or extended lineup of up to six members, The Sonics will perfectly cater to your event's needs.

You can even select your favorite songs from the band's set list, and choose up to 5 songs to avoid. The band uses your selection as a guide for artist, title, and musical style to create a bespoke, perfect set list just for your celebration. Please note that the final set list on the night is decided by the band's musical director.

We also offer an amazing Live Band Karaoke Experience – a fun, interactive show that lets you and your guests come up and sing along with an experienced live band. Strut your stuff and make unforgettable memories!

wedding-band-rome-italy-sonics.faq_html:
<details><summary>Qual è il prezzo del tuo servizio?</summary>A partire da 1500€.



</details><details><summary>Cosa include il pack matrimonio?</summary>Live set acustico per ricevimento/cerimonia/aperitivo, live set dance/rock/party, DJ set (opzionale), possibilità di richiedere e scegliere brani preferiti da ascoltare e/o ballare.



</details><details><summary>Con quanto anticipo mi devo mettere in contatto con te?</summary>Prima possibile!



</details><details><summary>Grandezza della formazione?</summary>Solista, piccola (2-3 musicisti), media (4-6 musicisti).



</details><details><summary>Repertorio?</summary>Da acoustic al party/rock, dal soul all' easy listening alla dance, da Elvis a Lady Gaga, dagli Abba ai Nirvana, da Gianni Morandi ai Subsonica in continuo aggiornamento.



</details><details><summary>Posso chiedere dei brani non inseriti nel repertorio?</summary>No problem, è possibile scegliere brani da inserire nel setlist.



</details><details><summary>Esperienza?</summary>La band è attiva da 7 anni, composta da musicisti professionisti, con lunga esperienza anche con artisti di fama nazionale!



</details><details><summary>Disponi di strumentazione propria?</summary>Sì.



</details><details><summary>Hai bisogno di un materiale in concreto o di specifiche condizioni per poter offrire il servizio?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Hai la possibilità di effettuare delle trasferte?</summary>Sì, ovunque!



</details><details><summary>Esiste un sovrapprezzo in caso di trasferta?</summary>Sì, da concordare in base alla destinazione...etc...



</details><details><summary>Lavori per più di un matrimonio al giorno?</summary>No.



</details><details><summary>Lavori da solo o con un'equipe di professionisti?</summary>In equipe.



</details><details><summary>Quanto tempo dura l'esibizione?</summary>Secondo richiesta.



</details><details><summary>Di quanto tempo hai bisogno per preparare l'esibizione?</summary>Il minimo indispensabile, cambia in base alle richieste del cliente, alla location, etc.



</details><details><summary>2izzi esibizioni all'aperto?</summary>Sì.</details>

wedding-band-rome-rising-stars.description_html:
With over 15 amazing years of experience, The Rising Stars have lit up stages all across Italy and beyond. We've played at weddings full of love, private parties bursting with joy, and corporate galas that call for a touch of elegance—each one a celebration to remember.

Check out Italy's top wedding bands ➡️

One of our greatest strengths is our huge, diverse repertoire. We love moving through different eras and genres, so we always have the perfect energy for every moment and every guest. From nostalgic classics to today's vibrant hits, our music becomes the living soundtrack to life's most cherished celebrations.

At heart, The Rising Stars are so much more than a band. We're curators of emotion, builders of beautiful memories, and joyful catalysts for celebration. It's not just about playing songs—it's about crafting an unforgettable symphony of moments that stay with you forever.

When you choose The Rising Stars, you're not just booking a band. You're securing an enchanting journey through the pure power of music. Here are our incredible lineup options:

  • Duo: A voice (male or female) paired with guitar or piano. Perfectly suited for civil or religious ceremonies, or for entertaining guests during an aperitif with a delicate, elegant Italian and international repertoire.
  • Strings Duo: Violin and cello come together beautifully for ceremonies and sophisticated aperitifs, blending classic and contemporary pieces.
  • All-Female Band: Voice, piano, drums, and bass bring the whole wedding reception to life with a wealth of Italian and international songs in a jazzy style, plus classic dance hits from the seventies to today.
  • All-Male Band: Four talented guys (voice, bass, guitar, and drums) who'll take you from aperitif to the final dance party! Their vast repertoire includes rockabilly (Jerry Lee Lewis, Elvis Presley), '70s and '80s dance (Gloria Gaynor, The Trammps, Barry White), current hits (Bruno Mars, Coldplay, Muse), and great Italian and international classics (Fabi, Tenco, Silvestri, Gino Paoli, Nat King Cole, Michael Bublè).
  • The Big Band: From two to five voices, plus a rhythm section and wind section. Their repertoire spans beloved Italian and international evergreens all the way to dance revival hits and today's favorites.
  • DJ Service: Ideal for the final dancing phase of your reception. They'll create a truly engaging disco atmosphere with a professional lighting system and a DJ-set that moves from lounge music (perfect for aperitifs or dinner) to dance, revival, rock & roll, Latin American, group dances, and commercial dance.

So, if you're looking to hire one of Rome's finest wedding and party bands, look no further than The Rising Stars. Reach out today—let's make something amazing together!
